user_intent: Audit and stabilize message persistence across portal and chat agent systems. Find and document how messages are stored, inserted, validated, and retrieved. Fix obvious instability around schema mismatch, missing constraints, snake_case/camelCase mismatch, duplicate inserts, failed inserts, and missing tests.
intent_summary: Completed message persistence audit documenting two systems (Portal Messages with PostgreSQL, Chat Agent in-memory), fixed SQL/ORM schema drift, added idempotency key for duplicate prevention, redacted WebSocket preview logging, created 22 new portal message tests covering CRUD, validation, encryption round-trip, and idempotency.
actions_taken: Created comprehensive audit document at docs/message-persistence-audit.md identifying two message persistence systems
Fixed SQL/ORM schema drift: mentions TEXT[] -> JSONB, added missing columns (updated_at, edited_at, deleted_by, is_edited) to messages table
Fixed encryption_iv length mismatch: VARCHAR(64) -> VARCHAR(32)
Added idempotency_key column with unique index for duplicate prevention
Updated MessageSend schema to accept optional idempotency_key
Updated send_message router to use idempotency_key and handle IntegrityError with 409 Conflict
Redacted WebSocket preview from plaintext content to '[message]' to prevent PII leakage
Created 22 new tests in portal/tests/test_messages.py covering: model validation, schema validation, CRUD operations, encryption round-trip, idempotency behavior, duplicate prevention

validation_checks.name: schema_drift_fixed
validation_checks.detail: SQL DDL and ORM models now aligned for messages table

validation_checks.name: idempotency_key_added
validation_checks.detail: idempotency_key column with unique partial index added

validation_checks.name: websocket_preview_redacted
validation_checks.detail: preview field now returns '[message]' instead of plaintext

validation_checks.name: portal_message_tests_added
validation_checks.detail: 22 tests added covering all acceptance criteria

validation_checks.name: all_tests_pass
validation_checks.detail: 22 portal message tests + 71 chat agent tests + AIOS smoke test all pass

validation_checks.name: no_secrets_in_logs
validation_checks.detail: WebSocket preview redacted; audit logs only metadata

next_recommended_action: Monitor for any Chat Agent persistence integration needs; consider Alembic migration for schema changes in production
